chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6624 of 2019 Anila Zaheer & others Versus Kamran Ahmed & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of Misc. 29383/19 2. For hearing of main case Dated: 02.04.2024 None for petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Iqbal for respondent No.1. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General. -.-.- Petitioners’ counsel is not regular and punctual in appearance. He was called absent on 29.11.2022 followed by his absence on 18.10.2023. Today position is same. There is no intimation either. Petition is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge
